title: aware and conscious.jar
body:
**Event.jar Mod/aware and conscious.jar**

- **BEFORE YOU PLAY KNOW THIS MOD CAN:**  
  - Modify game files  
  - System management  
  - Error display  
  - Game closure  
  - World deletion
  - Errors
  - Creating files
  - Replacing game files

ATTENTION!!!

THIS IS THE ONLY SITE WHERE I UPLOAD THE ORIGINAL MOD. DOWNLOADING MOD FROM OTHER SITES YOU RISK INFECTING YOUR COMPUTER WITH A VIRUS!!!!

This mod is arthouse nonsense, in the mod you will see a horror hodgepodge, many strange events not only in the game, but also on the computer while you play. The mod changes the generation of the world, adds  events and monsters. Also, for 30 days in a row you will be asked questions from the test for schizophasia.

Still in development, sorry for bugs. soon
